[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 001001011 4
4 100100001 3
5 001101101 5
6 011111000 5
7 001010000 2
